standard_description: Subtract multiples of 10 in the range 10-90 from multiples of 10 in the range 10-90 (positive or zero differences), using concrete models or drawings and strategies based on place value, properties of operations, and/or the relationship between addition and subtraction; relate the strategy to a written method and explain the reasoning used.
subject: Math

problems.text:
Problem 4
Pre-unit
Find the value of each difference.
\(77 - 10\)
\(77 - 20\)
\(90 - 70\)
